title: Resolution Authorizing Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into Contract for the Services of Ms. Jessamine B. Naquila, Registered Nurse As a Nurse to Be Assigned at the Municipal Health Office with Corresponding Monthly Compensation of Seventeen Thousand Six Hundred Eighty Pesos (P 17,680.00) Chargeable Against Gad Fund. (AUTHOR:COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON, 11/29/2021)
